privileged_info_summary: The inbound_asset_receiving task is a synthetic simulation using hardcoded test data generated by setup_task.sh. The packing slip contains 4 items from SECTION 1 (rows 01-04) plus 1 backorder in SECTION 2 (row 05). Valid items to register (marked OK): 8H29F2X (Dell Latitude 5520), CN-0Y9N-71618-88A-123 (Dell P2419H monitor), CN-0Y9N-71618-88A-124 (Dell P2419H monitor). Damaged item to exclude: 9J30G3Y (Dell Latitude 5520, damaged screen). Backorder to exclude: BC-1122-3344 (Dell WD19 docking station). Asset codes follow pattern AST-REC-{RowNumber} for valid items only, yielding AST-REC-01, AST-REC-03, AST-REC-04. The software platform openMAINT is real (open-source CMDB suite), and all referenced Dell products (Latitude 5520, P2419H monitor, WD19 dock) are actual products. Task date is 2026-03-08.
